initialize_session: Initialize the MCP session and confirm that the FastMCP stub is ready.
list_tools: List the available Playwright-style browser_to_url tools that can be invoked.
execute_tool: Execute a browser_to_url tool by name with a URL argument and return the result.
describe_resource: Describe the requested resource by id and provide its purpose.
query_data: Query the data definitions and return the matching payload or metadata.
